title: Sentinel AI
description: An anomaly detection system for network traffic that uses unsupervised learning to identify potential zero-day intrusions.
details: Sentinel AI analyzes packet capture data in real-time. Unlike signature-based IDS, it establishes a baseline of normal network behavior and flags statistical deviations. Achieved 94% accuracy on the NSL-KDD dataset.

title: NeuroArt Engine
description: A generative art tool that applies the stylistic elements of classic paintings to modern digital photography.
details: Implemented a VGG-19 based style transfer algorithm. Optimized inference time by 40% using model quantization. Built a simple frontend to allow users to upload content and style images.

title: Whisper Protocol
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging application implementing the Signal Protocol for perfect forward secrecy.
details: Built from scratch to understand cryptographic primitives. Features include self-destructing messages, key verification, and offline message queuing. Audited by peer group for common vulnerabilities.

title: Home Lab Infrastructure
description: Self-hosted homelab running Proxmox with segregated VLANs for malware analysis and media streaming.
details: Managed via Ansible playbooks. Includes a Pi-hole DNS sinkhole, a WireGuard VPN entry point, and a Grafana dashboard for monitoring system health and network traffic.
